en: Why don't I know you I'm new I just moved here from Africa what I used to be homeschooled wait what

en: My mom taught me at home no no I know what homeschool is I'm not so you've actually never been to a real school before

en: Shut up shut up I didn't say anything home school it's really interesting

en: Thanks you're like really pretty thank you so you agree what you think you're really pretty oh I don't know oh my God I love your

en: England so if you're from Africa why are you white oh my God Karen you can't just ask people why they're white could you give us some privacy for like
ko: 그래서 네가 아프리카에서 왔으면서 왜 하얀 건데? 오 мой 갓, 카렌, 너 그냥 사람에게 왜 하얀지 물어볼 수는 없어, 우리에게 잠시만 개인적인 시간을 주면 안 될까?
